Phase-61.NAME: Tablet and Mobile Adaptation Closure
Phase-61.objective: Close responsive gaps on phones and tablets immediately after the premium QA foundation.
Phase-61.non-goals: Changing business logic, backend APIs, deploy/install scripts, or adding native mobile apps.

steps.step-1: Audit public, auth, user, and admin routes at phone, tablet, and desktop viewports.
steps.step-2: Fix phone density issues at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932.
steps.step-4: Verify desktop layouts remain compact and not over-expanded.
steps.step-5: Verify mobile navigation, tablet split surfaces, bounded lists, and form control spacing.
steps.step-6: Run user/admin builds, responsive smoke, screenshots, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.
steps.step-7: Document remaining live-only screenshot gaps if auth prevents local protected-route capture.

Phase-61.acceptance: Premium frontend is intentionally adapted for phones and tablets, not just desktop-safe.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: frontend npm run build passed; primary JS 448870 bytes gzip 135741, primary CSS 44212 bytes gzip 8832.
2026-06-04: frontend-admin npm run build passed; primary JS 780907 bytes gzip 219491, primary CSS 39548 bytes gzip 8687. Vite large-chunk warning remains inside the Phase-61 940KB admin budget.

2026-06-04: scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs passed with phone, tablet, desktop, reduced-motion, safe-area, no-horizontal-scroll, no-overlap, touch-target, user/admin static proof, bundle budget, and protected-surface markers.
2026-06-04: scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs passed after the implementation commit, including Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 regression smokes and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.
2026-06-04: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime diff guard passed.
2026-06-04: Authenticated protected-route screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up evidence; local Phase-61 uses static-route proof instead of claiming live session screenshots.
